data.body: Done definition update: Expand docs scope to include (1) file-impact-v1 migration stamp location and format, plus a rollback procedure (delete stamp + FILE_IMPACT events tagged with migration-marker), documented in ticket-system-v3-architecture.md; (2) ADR for _direct_rest_put() pattern break with ACLI spike reference; (3) BRIDGE_ALERT reason taxonomy — add FILE_IMPACT_SYNC_FAILED and FILE_IMPACT_COMMENT_SYNC_FAILED entries (update bridge-alert-event.md contract if present); (4) reducer latest-wins semantics for FILE_IMPACT (chosen in story 2985-f04d). Without these, operators lack a recovery path for bad migrations, bridge dashboards see unknown reasons, and future contributors reverse-engineer the reducer semantics. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
